name_cn:
【Original Leather】🌈 Premium Exclusive🔥 White Plain/Gold
LE5A7 Large Smooth Leather Soft Hobo Large, Korean Celebrity Style Hobo!! This year's exploding hot shoulder bag Y's arrival!! The bag body has a simple, three-dimensional outline, looking structured but not too sharp. Paired with the brand's signature insert buckle, it gives a unique temperament that is both classic and elegant, yet very fashionable and modern.
Model: 753837【Original Leather】
Size: 30x31x13cm
